overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The character moves along wet sidewalks and under elevated highways, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles in a high-density urban environment with reflective surfaces and dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, following a group of pedestrians through the neon-lit district

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: large curved concrete and metal highway structure with multiple levels
tall futuristic buildings with glowing cyan and red neon signage
distinctive thin skyscraper visible in the distance against the sky
reflective wet pavement surface mirroring the golden hour light
low metal railing separating sidewalk from street traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk during golden hour, with the camera following a character past pedestrians. Neon-lit skyscrapers rise on the left while a massive elevated highway ramp dominates the right side. The wet pavement reflects the warm sunlight and building lights, creating a cinematic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and digital signage

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic lights and digital advertising kiosk becoming prominent
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection, crossing the street while avoiding vehicles and following the crowd

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall illuminated display showing colorful animated advertisements
overhead traffic signal gantry with red lights visible

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busy intersection, passing a digital advertising kiosk on the right. The scene opens up as the character steps onto the crosswalk, with traffic lights overhead and vehicles passing by. The elevated highway structure draws closer on the right as the character crosses the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with orange pavement

events.description: entering covered area under elevated highway with distinct orange textured pavement

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, passing fewer pedestrians in the more industrial zone

entered.detail: distinctive orange-yellow textured sidewalk surface with grid pattern
gray concrete industrial facade with metal pipes and red accent stripes
blue and black garbage bags piled near the building wall

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, characterized by distinctive orange textured pavement. The area feels more industrial with concrete buildings on the right and trash bags visible near the wall. The sky becomes partially obscured by the overhead highway structure, creating a more enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: camera turns right to reveal flooded underpass area beneath industrial building

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the flooded area under the building before continuing along the path

entered.detail: water-filled underpass beneath the industrial building with reflections of neon lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a flooded underpass area beneath the industrial building on the right, with murky water reflecting the ambient light. The camera briefly turns to observe this environmental detail before continuing. The area is more enclosed and industrial, with trash bags lining the path and the elevated highway now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, neon-lit city sidewalk into a gritty, enclosed industrial underpass. It begins by trailing a character past pedestrians on wet pavement, where towering skyscrapers and a massive elevated highway ramp reflect the warm glow of golden hour. As the character approaches a busy intersection, the scene opens up across a crosswalk filled with passing vehicles and digital advertising kiosks before the camera moves beneath the looming highway structure. The environment then shifts into a covered walkway with orange textured pavement and concrete walls, where the open sky is gradually replaced by an oppressive industrial ceiling. Finally, the path leads into a flooded underpass area where the camera observes murky reflections and trash-lined walls beneath the heavy concrete of the overpass.
